Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: zitherlike chordophones: plucked [300224198], zitherlike chordophones [300224193], chordophones [300041641], sound devices by acoustical characteristics [300041621], sound devices (equipment) [300387677], Sound Devices (hierarchy name) [300041619], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: keyboard instruments [300041674], musical instruments [300041620], sound devices by function [300205016], sound devices (equipment) [300387677], Sound Devices (hierarchy name) [300041619], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Zitherlike chordophones having a keyboard which operates a plucking mechanism to sound the strings; typically of an an elongated wing shape like a grand piano with strings that run parallel to the keys.

Cordófonos tipo cítara que tienen un teclado que opera un mecanismo de punteo para hacer sonar las cuerdas; normalmente en forma de un ala alargada como un piano de cola con cuerdas que corren paralelas a las teclas.
Snaarinstrumenten in de vorm van een vleugelpiano met een toetsenbord waarmee een tokkelmechanisme bedient wordt om de snaren te bespelen, met snaren die evenwijdig aan de toetsen lopen.
指類似齊特琴的弦鳴樂器，具有用來彈撥琴弦的鍵盤，通常為瘦長的翼狀，類似平台鋼琴，其琴弦與琴鍵平行。

Cordofones semelhantes a cítaras com teclado que opera um mecanismo de dedilhação para soar as cordas; tipicamente tem uma forma de asa alongada como um piano de cauda com cordas que correm paralelas às teclas.

Lauteninstrument mit einer Tastatur, die einen Zupfmechanismus betätigt, um die Saiten zum Klingen zu bringen. Das Instrument ist typischerweise von langgestreckter, geschwungener Form, ähnlich dem modernen Flügel, mit Saiten, die parallel zur Tastatur verlaufen.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030041/Sadie, New Grove Dictionary of Musical Instruments (1984)
